name: Norman Leyden
abstract: Norman Fowler Leyden (October 17, 1917 – July 23, 2014) was an American conductor, composer, arranger, and clarinetist. He worked in film and television and is perhaps best known as the conductor of the Oregon Symphony Pops orchestra.

about_quotes.speaker: Ray Shiner
about_quotes.evidence: I was doing a lot of jingles... I made sixty dollars a week doing two television shows with Norman Leyden.
